verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.
verse.verse_2: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
verse.verse_3: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
verse.verse_4: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood.
verse.verse_5: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.
